feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Facing error when creating MTO Production Order
entry.content:
Dear SAP Communitiy members,

I'm testing the process of MTO in our partner system, but we are facing error when checking the Material in the production order.

 



This is the error message that I'm facing now.

When I jump to configuration side, 

Availability key both 1 and 2 is exists in our system.
Can you give any advice why I'm facing this error when creating production order?

(I'm testing in the partner environment, so Availability key configuration side is provided by SAP)

Best Regards

entry.title: Key figures in app "Product Profitability with Production Variances"
entry.content:
About app "Product Profitability with Production Variances"，How to add Key Figures for Product Profitability with Production Variances ？

entry.title: The Relationship Category Is Contact Person For is Missing in the Business Partner Fiori Apps
entry.content:
The partner number is no longer visible when maintaining relations of a business partner / person.

 

 

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Professional Service for billing the product P003 is not allocated for usage based billing
entry.content:
Dear SAP Professional Services community,
APP:  Plan Customer Projects

I choose with the above APP and project to customer the work package = Service based (unit) and the Service unit = product / Activty type = U001. The related sales price for product U001 (PCP0 - Project WBS) = 1,15 € / per unit (in total 10.000 unit for the 6 months contract period). After project stage release and on the billing tab I used the contract type = usage based and after enter the system automated allocate the product = P002 instead of P003. 

Furthermore I can't create the monthly billing with the monthly unit = 500 and sales unit price = 1,15 € for the amount to be billed = 575 € (revenue).

I hope you could support me in this regards

Michael

entry.title: In app Work Center Capacity Application Jobs : "BackgroundJobUUID" error
entry.content:
How to fix issue about parameters "BackgroundJobUUID" ?
Thank you for your help

entry.title: Autosave of Outbound Delivery Printout
entry.content:
Client Requirement - A functionality to autosave the Delivery Printout in the system folder once the Outbound Delivery is created and PGI is done.

entry.title: How to register Vendor Subranges ?
entry.content:
In the Supplier role of the Business Partner Master, there is "Vendor Subranges" tab, but the New Entry button is inactive and cannot be registered. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SO automatically to PO in S/4 HANA cloud
entry.content:
I would like to know how to create a sales order that automatically converts to a purchase order.

And also, is there any way to automatically convert the purchase requisition to a purchase order?

entry.title: CDS View for Planned cost and revenue.
entry.content: We are developing a custom CDS view and seek to identify the available CDS views for planned costs and revenue of customer and internal projects in the Professional Services module of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

entry.title: Gaps in sequential PR numbering
entry.content:
There are gaps in sequential PR numbering.

entry.title: Sales Order overall status
entry.content:
Hello,

I have some questions about the logic to determine the sales order status: what is the parameter for a order to be in status 'Open' or 'In Process'? I have some orders that are 'In Process' but from my point of view should be in 'Open' status.

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to run the app Source Inspections - Worklist ( QI07 ) in Background in S/4HANA CLoud ?
entry.content:
In the App: "Source Inspections - Worklist", menu--> Program the option "Execute in Background" is disabled.

We want this to be triggered in background, we need this option to put background job schedule, how can we do this in S/4HANA Cloud ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change Printer in RF EWM Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi all,

It looks like currently in SAP Public Cloud 2408, the only way to assign a user to a new printer is through OPD. This poses issues as many clients want to be able to change their printer assignment in a mobile transaction. 

Additionally, there are no API's released that allow the change the assignment of a print queue to printer.  Meaning, we cannot develop our own application. 

In EWM 2023 FPS01, there has a been a release to allow the change of a printer (see link below) in RF. By going to Resource Management, a new field of '03 Printer' has been added.

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-sap/sap-extended-warehouse-management-in-sap-s-4hana-2023-fps01-private-cloud/ba-p/13620717

Unfortunately, it seems in Public Cloud there is no available option for this.  In OPD, we can assign a resource to a user's print queue. This print queue can then be assigned to a specific printer. Linking a resource to a mobile printer. However, we would also like to utilize the ability of assigning warehouse orders to pickers (resources) and not the resource itself. In addition, there is no ability to add resource group as a context data object in OPD.

 

So simply, my question is. Is there any other way of doing this?

entry.title: How to Upload Payment Advices in app Manage Payment Advices?
entry.content:
The requirement is to upload the payment advice in the app Manage Payment Advices.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: 雜項收發物料
entry.content:
大家好

請問S4HC內是否有類似ByDesign"成本中心耗用/成本中心退貨"的app用於雜項收發物料

我有找到一個app是"管理庫存"，庫存更改有三個選項能選，其中第一個"初始輸入項"用起來類似於雜收，但我希望能自己選擇成本中心與總帳科目。請問大家雜項收發在S4HC上都是用哪個app?

entry.title: Replicate B2B Customer From S4HANACE To SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Replicate a Business Partner From S4 HANA Cloud to a target system. 

Relationship of data is getting triggered before the master data, because of which it is resulting in error due to missing master data.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Replicate B2B Customer From S4HANACE To SAP Commerce Cloud


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: S4HANA PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION - CDS_VIEW FOR TAX RATE INFORMATION NOT FOUND
entry.content:
Good Morning,

We are trying to get in S4HANA PUBLIC EDITION  tax rate amount in cds views but we are not able to get the proper one. Neither in other blogs , community and post around.

Best regards,

Guillermo

entry.title: Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?
entry.content:
Dear All,

Is it possible that spread square frame of item of apps "Post General Entries" ?

This is the red line in the image.

If it cannot be done without UI Adaptation support, how do I search for apps that UI Adaptation supports?

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Error Message no. CJ055 'PEP element is already imputed and cannot be deleted'
entry.content:
Hi everybody,

When we tried to delete a PEP element in our Project and the next error shows up:

'PEP element is already imputed and cannot be deleted' Nº CJ055

Our project and PEP elements are only in 'Created' status.

Any solutions ?

Regards Community

entry.title: Total Value in POR is converted incorrectly
entry.content:
Hi,


We created a POR in production system with currency GBP. Currency rate is maintained for GBP to EUR. However, the total value calculated by the system is not correct, it is multiplied by 10. I tried to check the configuration but I don't see issues with unit of measure since we have used the UOM YR in the past. I think it is related to the currency GBP.


Can you help to check please?


Thank you. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
